name: linkedin-operator
description: Drive a logged-in LinkedIn session from Codex with browser automation, structured extraction, and confirmation-first outbound actions.

interface.shortDescription: Control LinkedIn safely through browser automation and structured workflows.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin for operating a real LinkedIn session. It supports login checks, people and company research, inbox review, draft-first outreach, and confirmation-gated actions such as sending messages, connection requests, comments, or posts.
defaultPrompt: Open LinkedIn, check whether I am logged in, and tell me what actions are safe right now.
Search LinkedIn for AI founders in Bengaluru and return 10 structured results.
Open my LinkedIn inbox, summarize unread threads, and draft replies without sending.
